mapper.sql: id, ent_time, acc_time, province_id, city_id, scene_id, so_province, so_city, num
mapper.select: select sum(num) as num,scenic_name from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code where scene_id = scenic_code and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by scene_id

select sum(num) as num,province_name from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code join region_code where scenic_code = scene_id and city_code= so_city and scenic_name like concat(#{scenicName},'%') and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by province_name order by num desc limit 12

select sum(num) as num,city_name from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code join region_code where scenic_code = scene_id and city_code= so_city and scenic_name like concat(#{scenicName},'%') and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and region_code.province_code = 081 group by city_name order by num desc limit 12

select sum(num) as num,province_name from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code join region_code where scenic_code = scene_id and city_code= so_city and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by province_name order by num desc limit 5
select sum(num) as num from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code where scenic_code = scene_id and scenic_name like concat(#{scenicName},'%') and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
select sum(num) as num from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code where scenic_code = scene_id and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

select sum(num) as num, scenic_code.scenic_name as scenic from tourist_source_scenic_day join scenic_code where scenic_code = scene_id and acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY scenic_code.scenic_name
select sum(num) as num, acc_time as date from tourist_source_scenic_day where acc_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY acc_time ORDER BY acc_time asc
